arts.ttl: Accusation of Arsenal and Manchester City being used in effort to ‘blackmail’ club over transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester City have found themselves being used in an effort by Manfred Ugalde’s agents to ‘blackmail’ Spartak Moscow, according to claims from Russia today. The story is according to Russian outlet Mash, who report that neither Arsenal nor Manchester City have serious interest in the striker. arts.ttl: Erling Haaland responds to Real Madrid and Barcelona question after signing new contract
arts.sum: Manchester City forward Erling Haaland has stated that the club ‘feels like home’ following a new 9.5-year deal, which would keep him at the club until 2034. The deal is believed to make him the highest-paid player in European football, but his long-term future is not entirely settled depending on who you speak to. arts.ttl: Man City accused of encouraging player to break contract
arts.sum: Real Valladolid accuse Manchester City of encouraging one of their players to break his contract to force through a move to the Premier League club.

arts.ttl: Manchester City target Juma Bah REFUSES to train at Real Valladolid as furious Spanish club claim Premier League champions are 'behind' shock move
